message:
fix(tmux): replace timing-based Enter delivery with verification-based retry (gt-0b5)

NudgeSession/NudgePane Enter key races with text delivery under load.
The fixed 500ms+600ms delays are insufficient when tmux buffers keystroke
processing, causing Enter to be treated as part of the text stream.

Two changes:
1. sendEnterVerified: after sending Enter, polls pane content to confirm
   it was processed. If unchanged, retries Enter with exponential backoff
   (500ms → 1s → 2s), max 3 retries. Falls back to unverified delivery
   if pane capture fails.
2. adaptiveTextDelay: scales the post-text delay with message length
   (500ms base + 25ms per extra chunk, capped at 2s) so longer chunked
   messages get proportionally more processing time.
